content:
🔥 aether | JavaScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: To easily create and apply cohesive desktop themes by extracting colors from wallpapers, supporting a wide range of applications.
✨ Key Features: • Color Extraction from wallpapers • Wallpaper Browser (wallhaven.cc, local files) • Image Filters (blur, exposure, presets) • Color Presets (Dracula, Nord, Gruvbox, Catppuccin) • Base16 Import
📖 Summary: Aether is a visual theming application for Omarchy and other Linux desktops. It allows users to extract color palettes from wallpapers, apply them to various applications, and manage themes through a graphical interface or command line.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
